entries.source: Reading knowledge plus formal speech routines
Recognition is useful, but it is weaker evidence than applying the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Herkenning is nuttig, maar dit is swakker bewys as om die idee toe te pas sonder dat die antwoord voor jou is.

entries.source: Recommend opening questions for this encounter, grouped by interview, debate, contradiction, and legacy.
entries.value: Beveel openingsvrae vir hierdie ontmoeting aan, gegroepeer volgens onderhoud, debat, teenstrydigheid en nalatenskap.

entries.source: Reconstruct a decision, alternatives, constraints, and outcomes.
entries.value: Rekonstrueer 'n besluit, alternatiewe, beperkings en uitkomste.

entries.source: Red sandstone heat, ink, perfumed paper, controlled silence, and many languages orbiting power.
entries.value: Rooi sandsteen hitte, ink, geparfumeerde papier, beheerde stilte, en baie tale wat om mag wentel.

entries.source: Reframe my next question as a student trying to understand the mental model, not just the biography.
entries.value: Herformuleer my volgende vraag as 'n student wat die denkemodel probeer verstaan, nie net die biografie nie.

entries.source: Remove weak, generic, or low-fit ideas quickly.
entries.value: Verwyder swak, generiese of onvanpaste idees vinnig.

entries.source: Removes the failing path instead of understanding it.
entries.value: Verwyder die foutiewe pad in plaas daarvan om dit te verstaan.

entries.source: Repairing the misconception makes the next problem easier instead of just more familiar.
entries.value: Om die wanopvatting reg te stel maak die volgende probleem makliker in plaas van net meer bekend.

entries.source: Repeating a definition without applying it can feel fluent while hiding gaps.
entries.value: Om 'n definisie te herhaal sonder om dit toe te pas, kan vlot klink terwyl dit leemtes verbloem.

entries.source: Rephrase the active question in simpler language. Ask only one question.
entries.value: Formuleer die aktiewe vraag in eenvoudiger taal. Vra slegs een vraag.

entries.source: Reset the controls, move only one slider, and describe the before-and-after in plain language.
entries.value: Stel die kontroles terug, beweeg slegs een skuifbalk, en beskryf die voor-en-na in eenvoudige taal.

entries.source: Resolve the event clock before opening the world
entries.value: Los die gebeurtenisklok op voordat die wêreld oopgemaak word

entries.source: Restaurants and drivers can be suppliers, but this specific clue is about customers comparing and switching.
entries.value: Restaurante en bestuurders kan verskaffers wees, maar hierdie spesifieke leidraad gaan oor kliënte wat vergelyk en oorskakel.

entries.source: Restoration London faces plague memory, dense timber housing, and a fire that will reshape the city.
entries.value: Restourasie-Londen staar die herinnering aan die pes, digte houtbehuising en 'n brand wat die stad sal hervorm, in die gesig.

entries.source: Reveal the starting model before the lesson explains it.
entries.value: Openbaar die beginmodel voordat die les dit verduidelik.

entries.source: Rewrite the current rough section as a suggested edit. Show what changed and why before asking me to merge it.
entries.value: Herskryf die huidige rowwe afdeling as 'n voorgestelde wysiging. Wys wat verander het en hoekom voordat jy my vra om dit saam te voeg.

entries.source: Right. Transfer to a fresh example is stronger evidence than recognition.
entries.value: Reg. Oordrag na 'n vars voorbeeld is sterker bewys as herkenning.

entries.source: Right. You identified a seller-side cost shock and predicted the pressure on price.
entries.value: Reg. Jy het 'n kosteskok aan die verkoperkant geïdentifiseer en die druk op prys voorspel.

entries.source: Roman trade used amphorae and contracts
entries.value: Romeinse handel het amfore en kontrakte gebruik

entries.source: Rumors move faster than verified news
entries.value: Gerugte beweeg vinniger as geverifieerde nuus

entries.source: Rupees, silver coin, credit through trusted households
entries.value: Roepees, silwermunt, krediet deur betroubare huishoudings

entries.source: Safe, explanatory, and easier to pause for context.
entries.value: Veilig, verduidelikend en makliker om te pouseer vir konteks.

entries.source: Safer, more explanatory, and allowed to ask modern comparisons.
entries.value: Veiliger, meer verduidelikend en toegelaat om moderne vergelykings te vra.

entries.source: Salt air, olive oil, rope fiber, shouted accounts, and the heavy logistics behind imperial abundance.
entries.value: Soutlug, olyfolie, touvesel, uitgeroepte rekeninge en die swaar logistiek agter imperiale oorvloed.

entries.source: Salt March strategist, St. Helena retrospective, 1946 committee room...
Say why the mistake is tempting, then name the missing link.
entries.value: Sê waarom die fout aanloklik is, en noem dan die ontbrekende skakel.

entries.source: Saying revenue is up, so the company is worth more ignores margins, reinvestment, working capital, and risk.
entries.value: Om te sê dat inkomste styg, en die maatskappy dus meer werd is, ignoreer marges, herbelegging, bedryfskapitaal en risiko.

entries.source: Seeing the output change but not naming the mechanism.
entries.value: Om te sien dat die uitset verander, maar nie die meganisme benoem nie.

entries.source: Set a place, period, and mission. Your guide will keep the trip bounded to the era and mark speculation clearly.
entries.value: Stel 'n plek, tydperk en missie. Jou gids sal die reis tot die era beperk en bespiegeling duidelik merk.

entries.source: Set a thinking target and I will ask the first diagnostic question.
entries.value: Stel 'n denkdoelwit en ek sal die eerste diagnostiese vraag vra.

entries.source: Several locations, figures, artifacts, and field notes.
entries.value: Verskeie liggings, figure, artefakte en veldnotas.
Skepe laai graan en olie af

entries.source: Short factual notes clarify uncertainty, bias, and interpretation.
entries.value: Kort feitelike notas verduidelik onsekerheid, vooroordeel en interpretasie.

entries.source: Short summaries keep both sides aligned before moving on.
entries.value: Kort opsommings hou beide kante in lyn voordat daar aangegaan word.

entries.source: Should a company enter this market?
Show more uncertainty, anachronism, and source-boundary notes.
entries.value: Wys meer onsekerheid, anakronisme en bron-grensnotas.

entries.source: Show the person's major beliefs at this time, their blind spots, and what they would likely resist understanding.
entries.value: Wys die persoon se hoofoortuigings op hierdie tydstip, hul blindekolle, en waarteen hulle waarskynlik weerstand sal bied om te verstaan.

entries.source: Sketch the outline, sections, or table before polishing language.
entries.value: Skets die uiteensetting, afdelings of tabel voordat taal gepoleer word.

entries.source: Small nudges arrive before direct explanations.
entries.value: Klein stootjies arriveer voor direkte verduidelikings.

entries.source: Small reserve in local coin or credit
entries.value: Klein reserwe in plaaslike munt of krediet

entries.source: Socrates was tried and executed in 399 BCE
entries.value: Sokrates is in 399 v.C. verhoor en tereggestel

entries.source: someone who changed education and faced serious opposition
entries.value: iemand wat onderwys verander het en ernstige teenkanting in die gesig gestaar het

entries.source: Sources, confidence, uncertainty, and forbidden quotes.
entries.value: Bronne, vertroue, onsekerheid en verbode aanhalings.

entries.source: Specific prices vary by evidence and period
entries.value: Spesifieke pryse wissel volgens bewyse en tydperk

entries.source: Specific private opinions of unnamed residents
entries.value: Spesifieke private menings van ongenoemde inwoners

entries.source: Split work into AI-owned, user-owned, and shared moves.
entries.value: Verdeel werk in KI-besit, gebruiker-besit en gedeelde skuiwe.

entries.source: Stage the person, year, room, and relationship.
entries.value: Stel die persoon, jaar, kamer en verhouding op.

entries.source: Standing idle with strange questions during a disaster invites suspicion.
entries.value: Om ledig te staan met vreemde vrae tydens 'n ramp wek agterdog.

entries.source: Start a Time Travel expedition. Do not open a generic chat and do not write a broad period summary.
entries.value: Begin 'n tydreis-ekspedisie. Moenie 'n algemene klets oopmaak nie en moenie 'n breë tydperkopsomming skryf nie.

entries.source: Start with a concept, case, argument, decision, or text.
entries.value: Begin met 'n konsep, saak, argument, besluit of teks.

entries.source: Start with a question, not a lecture.
entries.value: Begin met 'n vraag, nie 'n lesing nie.

entries.source: Start with a tiny lesson, one check question, a mastery meter, and wait for my answer before continuing.
entries.value: Begin met 'n klein les, een kontrole-vraag, 'n bemeesteringsmeter, en wag vir my antwoord voordat jy voortgaan.

entries.source: Start with an era passport, a vivid arrival scene, three choices for what to do next, and a compact timeline log.
entries.value: Begin met 'n era-paspoort, 'n lewendige aankomstoneel, drie keuses vir wat om volgende te doen, en 'n kompakte tydlynlogboek.

entries.source: Start with one specific question or task.
entries.value: Begin met een spesifieke vraag of taak.

entries.source: State the idea in one sentence so it can be tested.
entries.value: Stel die idee in een sin sodat dit getoets kan word.

entries.source: State your starting idea so the tutor has something to test.
entries.value: Stel jou begin-idee sodat die tutor iets het om te toets.

entries.source: Stateful exploration with consequences and evolving risk.
entries.value: Toestandsgebaseerde verkenning met gevolge en ontwikkelende risiko.

entries.source: Step by step, brainstorm first, solve together...
entries.value: Stap vir stap, dink eers saam, los saam op...

entries.source: Step out of character briefly. Explain the historical context, evidence quality, and uncertainties behind the last exchange.
entries.value: Tree kortliks uit karakter. Verduidelik die historiese konteks, bewysgehalte en onsekerhede agter die laaste uitruiling.

entries.source: Stone dust, wool dye, bells, and sharp political glances under a crowded square.
entries.value: Steenstof, wolkleurstof, klokke en skerp politieke blikke onder 'n stampvol plein.

entries.source: Stop editing directly for this turn. Give concise advice and one practical next move.
entries.value: Hou op om direk te redigeer vir hierdie beurt. Gee bondige advies en een praktiese volgende stap.

entries.source: Stopped. Send another message whenever you are ready.
entries.value: Gestop. Stuur nog 'n boodskap wanneer jy gereed is.

entries.source: Strict mode keeps modern knowledge out of the world and applies social consequences sooner.
entries.value: Streng modus hou moderne kennis uit die wêreld en pas vroeër sosiale gevolge toe.

entries.source: Strong writing is a chain of claim, reason, evidence, and consequence. Each sentence should do a job in that chain.
entries.value: Sterk skryfwerk is 'n ketting van bewering, rede, bewyse en gevolg. Elke sin moet 'n taak in daardie ketting verrig.

entries.source: Substitutes are alternatives like cooking or pickup. Comparing apps is buyer leverage inside the category.
entries.value: Plaasvervangers is alternatiewe soos kook of afhaal. Om toepassings te vergelyk is kopershefboom binne die kategorie.

entries.source: Suggest candidates with strong evidence and vivid settings.
entries.value: Stel kandidate voor met sterk bewyse en lewendige omgewings.
Voorrade en lojaliteite is onder druk

entries.source: Supply shifts left and price tends to rise.
entries.value: Aanbod skuif na links en prys is geneig om te styg.

entries.source: Take the first pass on the shared artifact. Make the structure visible, mark assumptions, and ask me to accept, edit, or reject.
entries.value: Neem die eerste deurgang op die gedeelde artefak. Maak die struktuur sigbaar, merk aannames, en vra my om te aanvaar, te wysig of te verwerp.

entries.source: Tang Chang'an is a cosmopolitan imperial capital linked to steppe, Central Asian, and Buddhist networks.
entries.value: Tang Chang'an is 'n kosmopolitiese keiserlike hoofstad wat verbind is met steppe-, Sentraal-Asiatiese en Boeddhistiese netwerke.

entries.source: Target: one sentence describing the learning target.
entries.value: Teiken: een sin wat die leerdoelwit beskryf.
Leer my Porter se vyf kragte

entries.source: That catches the revenue movement, but misses the margin and cash timing links. Sales alone do not prove cash flow improved.
entries.value: Dit vang die inkomstebeweging vas, maar mis die skakels tussen marge en kontanttydsberekening. Verkope alleen bewys nie dat kontantvloei verbeter het nie.

entries.source: That may hide the symptom, but it does not teach you where the data flow broke.
entries.value: Dit mag dalk die simptoom wegsteek, maar dit leer jou nie waar die datavloei gebreek het nie.

entries.source: The assistant must identify known facts before simulating
entries.value: Die assistent moet bekende feite identifiseer voordat daar gesimuleer word

entries.source: The Athenian agora was a civic center
entries.value: Die Atheense agora was 'n burgerlike sentrum
Die Bastille het op 14 Julie 1789 geval

entries.source: The explanation that links evidence back to the claim.
entries.value: Die verduideliking wat bewyse terugskakel na die bewering.

entries.source: The final summary waits until you have done real thinking.
entries.value: Die finale opsomming wag totdat jy werklik gedink het.

entries.source: The first scene should become concrete only after the destination is resolved.
entries.value: Die eerste toneel moet eers konkreet word nadat die bestemming bepaal is.
Die Groot Brand het in 1666 begin

entries.source: The Indian Rebellion of 1857 has made Delhi a contested imperial and military space.
entries.value: Die Indiese rebellie van 1857 het Delhi 'n betwiste imperiale en militêre ruimte gemaak.

entries.source: The learner can connect a variable change to an outcome.
entries.value: Die leerder kan 'n veranderlike verandering aan 'n uitkoms koppel.

entries.source: The learner can explain the key link in their own words.
entries.value: Die leerder kan die sleutelskakel in eie woorde verduidelik.

entries.source: The learner can identify and fix the misconception.
entries.value: Die leerder kan die wanopvatting identifiseer en regstel.

entries.source: The learner can make a first prediction.
entries.value: Die leerder kan 'n eerste voorspelling maak.

entries.source: The learner explains it back in their own words.
entries.value: Die leerder verduidelik dit in eie woorde terug.

entries.source: The longest sentence, because shorter is always stronger.
entries.value: Die langste sin, want korter is altyd sterker.

entries.source: The person should not know future events unless you explicitly open modern confrontation.
entries.value: Die persoon behoort nie toekomstige gebeure te ken nie, tensy jy eksplisiet moderne konfrontasie open.

entries.source: The Roman Empire under Trajan's final year depends on ports, credit, labor, and imperial logistics.
entries.value: Die Romeinse Ryk onder Trajanus se finale jaar hang af van hawens, krediet, arbeid en imperiale logistiek.

entries.source: The scene is being established by the dossier.
entries.value: Die toneel word deur die dossier gevestig.

entries.source: The simulation will prioritize different people, risks, objects, and explanations.
entries.value: Die simulasie sal verskillende mense, risiko's, voorwerpe en verduidelikings prioritiseer.

entries.source: The title, because every weak paragraph has a weak title.
entries.value: Die titel, want elke swak paragraaf het 'n swak titel.

entries.source: The Travel Designer should resolve this intent into a specific historical place, date, and political moment before arrival.
entries.value: Die Reisontwerper moet hierdie voorneme in 'n spesifieke historiese plek, datum en politieke oomblik oplos voor aankoms.

entries.source: The version of a person matters more than the name.
entries.value: Die weergawe van 'n persoon maak meer saak as die naam.

entries.source: The West Market hosted long-distance trade
This is the evidence checkpoint. You advance only by showing the skill.
entries.value: Dit is die bewys-kontrolepunt. Jy vorder slegs deur die vaardigheid te toon.

entries.source: This lets you explain why a model moves instead of just copying formulas.
entries.value: Dit laat jou verduidelik waarom 'n model beweeg in plaas daarvan om net formules te kopieer.

entries.source: Time slice: not chosen yet. If a specific person is named, offer 4 to 5 historically meaningful versions of this person before any in-character dialogue. Explain how each version changes the worldview, stakes, and setting.
entries.value: Tydsny: nog nie gekies nie. As 'n spesifieke persoon genoem word, bied 4 tot 5 histories betekenisvolle weergawes van hierdie persoon aan voor enige in-karakter dialoog. Verduidelik hoe elke weergawe die wêreldbeskouing, belange en omgewing verander.

entries.source: Titles matter, but this clue points to reasoning inside the paragraph.
entries.value: Titels is belangrik, maar hierdie leidraad wys na beredenering binne die paragraaf.

entries.source: Trace a trade route on the map
entries.value: Trek 'n handelsroete op die kaart na

entries.source: trace cause and effect in code
entries.value: spoor oorsaak en gevolg in kode na

entries.source: Track accepted changes, rejected changes, and the next edit.
entries.value: Volg aanvaarde veranderinge, verwerpte veranderinge en die volgende redigering.

entries.source: Track decisions and open questions. Preserve my voice in writing tasks. Ask at most one practical question if context is missing.
entries.value: Volg besluite en oop vrae. Behou my stem in skryftake. Vra hoogstens een praktiese vraag as konteks ontbreek.
